## Backlog

- Backlog ID:
- Phase:

## No-Mock Completion Check

- [ ] This change does not mark mock, fixed JSON, fake buttons, fake success toast, or unconnected UI as complete.
- [ ] Incomplete actions are disabled, marked coming soon, or explicitly blocked.
- [ ] Frontend actions use real routes, real API calls, or explicit blocked states.
- [ ] Rust APIs connect to service/repository/DB, or are explicitly unfinished.
- [ ] PostgreSQL changes use migrations or documented seed/import flow.
- [ ] Assets/audio/video are real files and are registered in the manifest or asset table.
- [ ] Child-facing surfaces contain no ads, purchases, external links, or unreviewed AI content.

## Verification

- [ ] Port policy check, if ports/services/config changed.
- [ ] Frontend build, if frontend changed.
- [ ] Rust check/test, if backend changed.
- [ ] Asset/content checker, if assets or content changed.
- [ ] Browser smoke or screenshot, if UI changed.
